KATE FORETTI WHO SUBMITTED A DECLARATION IN THIS CASE IS A FORMER EMPLOYEE OF THE CIVIL SERVICE COMMISSION AND HAS SERVED WITH HER IN A BOARD. HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL.
